'''Recopia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Recopi system/Legends|Recopi system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], between the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] and the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. It was the site of the annual [[Bandercamp Auctions]] in the [[Hinder Market]].

==Geographic features==
Lacking valuable natural resources, Recopia was less urbanized than many other prominent worlds of the Core. It was a world of [[Sulfur/Legends|sulfuric]] [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] over which [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] clouds roiled perpetually. The hostile seas were broken only by series of plateau islands that rose high into the sky.

==History==
The non-descript island of [[Mallif Cove]] on Recopia was once home to a hidden [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] belonging to the [[Seyugi Dervish]]es, an enclave of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-sensitive [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]].

Recopia was also one of the first Core Worlds to openly support the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] following their victory at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Due to its strategic location, the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]] established a [[Base Delta-Nine|base]] there, from which many early attacks on the Core were launched. It was from their Recopia base that the New Republic attacked [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 1|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 1]] {{Mo}}
